description_long: This sculpture depicts two seated human figures, a man and a woman, rendered in a stylized, somewhat abstract manner. The figures are positioned closely together atop a large, rectangular stone or concrete plinth, with the woman on the left and the man on the right. The woman has one arm around the man's shoulders and her other arm raised high, as if waving or gesturing. Both figures are dressed in simple, flowing garments, and their facial features are softly modeled. The surface of the figures has a patinated, bluish-green bronze appearance, contrasting with the gray, rougher texture of the plinth. A small plaque is visible on the front face of the plinth, suggesting the presence of a title or dedication.
description: A stylized bronze sculpture of a man and woman seated together on a large stone plinth, with the woman raising one arm in a gesture. The figures are closely posed, and a plaque is mounted on the front of the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures seated side by side, the woman with her arm raised and a plaque visible on the plinth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figures, the woman's raised arm, and the depth of the plinth.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the figures and the broad, unadorned surface of the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the man's profile and the thickness of the plinth beneath the figures.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figures, man and woman
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a large stone plinth, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting.
